caption: The video features a man performing in front of an audience, likely in a classroom or small auditorium setting. He is dressed in a white shirt with intricate blue embroidery and a black vest, giving him a traditional or cultural appearance. The man is playing a guitar and singing into a microphone, suggesting he is either teaching or entertaining the group. His focused expression and the way he handles the instrument indicate that he is experienced and passionate about his performance. The audience, visible in the foreground, appears attentive and engaged, adding to the intimate and educational atmosphere of the scene. The logo "ORCA" in the corner suggests that this event may be associated with an organization or program by that name.
